description: Edge case — information-sector borrower (NAICS 51) exactly at 5.0x leverage; strict >5.0 condition means within threshold at the boundary
regulatory_basis: Interagency Leveraged Lending Guidance (OCC/FRB/FDIC SR 13-3) — information-sector borrowers may carry up to 5.0x leverage given recurring revenue profiles; exactly at the cap is within tolerance
